scripts.smoke: node -e "(async()=>{ const { spawn } = require('child_process'); const server = spawn('python3',['server.py'], { stdio: 'inherit' }); process.on('exit', ()=> server.kill()); setTimeout(()=>{ require('child_process').spawnSync('node',['tools/smoke-test.js'], { stdio:'inherit' }); server.kill(); }, 1200); })()"
